Jessica Taylor
Los Angeles, CA

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 5 years of experience in retail environments. Strong communication skills and a proven ability to manage multiple tasks in fast-paced settings. Seeking to transition into warehouse roles to leverage my organizational skills and commitment to excellence.

Experience
Customer Service Associate  
Best Buy, Los Angeles, CA  
March 2020 - Present  
- Provided exceptional customer service to clients in a high-volume retail store.  
- Assisted in inventory management and restocking shelves, ensuring accurate product placement.  
- Trained new staff members on customer interaction and store protocols.

Sales Associate  
Target, Los Angeles, CA  
June 2017 - February 2020  
- Engaged with customers to enhance their shopping experience, addressing inquiries and concerns.  
- Collaborated with team members to maintain an organized and visually appealing sales floor.  
- Participated in annual inventory audits, although not directly involved in heavy lifting or warehousing tasks.
